nasb.text: The eye is the lamp of your body; when your eye is clear, your whole body also is full of light; but when it is bad, your body also is full of darkness.

esv.text: Your eye is the lamp of your body. When your eye is healthy, your whole body is full of light, but when it is bad, your body is full of darkness.

cnv.text: 你的眼睛就是你身體的燈，你的眼睛健全，全身就明亮；如果不健全，全身就黑暗。

ccb.text: 你的眼睛就是身体的灯，你的眼睛明亮，全身就光明；你的眼睛昏花，全身就黑暗。

csbs.text: 你的眼睛是身体的灯。当你的眼睛纯净的时候，你的全身就光明；你的眼睛一旦污浊，你的全身就黑暗。
